title: Ice and Fire - Retextures
description: A Mod that retextures your favorite Mythical mod- Ice And Fire: Dragons!
body:
Ice And Fire Retextures- A mod that retextures the old ice and fire textures, giving them a fresh new look.

**NOTE: THIS IS A NEW BUILD. THERE WIL BE ALOT MORE COMING SOON**
**(also, if you want the other versions, then download on Curseforge:**
[Ice and Fire - Retextures - Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/ice-and-fire-retextures)


![what does it do?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8bebf30af53badb46b03d4e8fade01985efd6e5_0.webp)

This is a resource pack that retextures some old ice and fire textures, and remodelling them with a post 1.14 style look.

 

![requires iaf:d](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cfbe9da8f1a3b86c81adf496f59dc48c6cd4a70_0.webp)

 

Requires Ice and Fire Dragons:       https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ice-and-fire-dragons

 
![so...?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fcaa2a04ad6eb6c14ec11fd38c2eef435698f0d_0.webp)
 

**_MOBS:_**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

-Changed the Texture of the Gorgon

![g1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29b1e01645fe4bf862e0737e0a922fce0c10b608.png)![g2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7af7a8168b6c087a125b4229d4f2f1b7ef254dc.png)

-Changed the Texture of the Siren

![s1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8256dee715c743cda3ef590fa68809943bcd2342.png)![s2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6938a86f629279cc918f9595b1a48ef8cf53681.png)![s3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13a6885ec42d3484114a5a279273d183561f2aeb.png)![s4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f1f0ec354e9bdd3f7df360c3513c821b09f31fa.png)

-Changed the Texture of all the Pixies

![p1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6108e79607d03cd7b19b3abbfe06248be6805b2c.png)![p2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f64eb443e08eec176920bcd6f6d5f58e43dcff0.png)

-Changed the texture of the trolls

![t1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd5a635011679d69d1c74d11c61c00d96e8893c1.png)![t2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed0a30504f9d64a8cc106a179040f0b98009c0d5.png)

</details>


**_ITEMS:_**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21014f2f4a8108e22ee536f6433a055ee22f3c15.png)

-Changed Description of the Siren Flute.

-Changed the Earplugs' name and texture into Beeswax to symbolise the Adventures of Odysseus (When the sailors aboard the Odyssey blocked their ears with Beeswax to prevent them from hearing the Sirens' Song).

-Changed the Scales of Sirens to be black to show that when Sirens' are killed, their scales turn black (nowhere ever said this but I made it up idk).

-Changed the Texture of the Dragon Command Staff, along with all the Dragon Skulls.

-changed the textures of all troll weapons, the troll tusk, the troll skull (including when placed), the manuscript, the bestiary (when on a lectern), and changed the name of the bestiary to "Book of Beasts" , along with all the troll's weapons.

</details> 

**_SOUNDS_**:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

-Changed all the Siren sounds

-Changed the "turning into stone" sound (when you turn into stone because of the gorgon)


</details>

![update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0c74c372c0d1175fe0ea5c85f6d1065b9bcccd7_0.webp)
 

THE TROLL UPDATE
